issue_summary: Create an abstract base class for our graph implementations. Eliminate lots of redundant code! Also improves the (currently incorrectly documented) runtime of removeNode() in IncidenceSetUndirectedGraph on multigraphs from O(degree^2) to O(degree). Created by MOE: https://github.com/google/moe MOE_MIGRATED_REVID=114995238
javadoc_before:
/**
   * An interface for builders of immutable graph instances.
   *
   * @param <N> Node parameter type
   * @param <E> Edge parameter type
   * TODO(user): Consider throwing exception when the graph is not affected
   * by method calls (methods returning false).
   */
javadoc_after:
/**
   * An abstract class for builders of immutable graph instances.
   *
   * @param <N> Node parameter type
   * @param <E> Edge parameter type
   */
